title: Cataclysmic Creepers
description: adds a bit more life to Creepers in multiple different horrific Ways
body:
***this mod adds a bit more life to Creepers in multiple different horrific Ways***

---

This is based of the Idea that Creepers are Plants and Plants grow, so I made Creepers grow too in their own way.

For example i added **Creeper Plants** with Creeper Seeds [that are scattered around the world (only in 1.0 version)] these will also  eventually grow into normal Creepers, so you better want to break them but i have a Tip, break them in their last Stage for some extra loot.

---

**Creepers** also now have a 10% Chance on spawn, to be able to overmutate.
When a Creeper has this ability they will mutate into 2 **Creeper Blocks** after about one minecraft day with normal tick speed.

**Creeper Blocks** will spread and grow for a long time and will form a big nasty Creeper-Blob with many Heads and other offsprings growing out of it.
The blocks are also extremely vurnerable against Fire, but when you just burn them they will drop nothing,
so you can alternatively mine them with a hoe to get some **XP and Gunpowder**.
If it has grown for long enough it will enter a primed state and will eventually explode into many new Creeper Seeds with many new Creepers, to grow out of them and so the Cycle continues.

---

***so if you like Creepers and Pain this is a Mod for You***

---

[CurseForge Page](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cataclysmic-creepers)




*this mod is made with MCreator*
